SKETCH PALETTE
TIMELINE
Parametric timeline — features you create will appear here

Fusion Labs

A parametric CAD sandbox — no login, no cloud, everything computes in this file.
  1. Create Sketch → pick a plane or the flat top of a body → draw with Line L, Rectangle R, Circle C — type exact sizes as you draw.
  2. Finish Sketch → closed shapes shade blue as profiles.
  3. Extrude E profiles into bodies — Join, Cut, Intersect or New Body. Drag the blue arrow.
  4. Polish with Fillet / Chamfer / Shell, repeat with Patterns, recolour with Appearance A.
  5. Roll the blue timeline marker to travel through your design history. Double-click any chip to edit it.
💡 A circle drawn inside a rectangle automatically becomes a hole when you extrude — exactly like the vent holes in the Pi case. Press S anytime for the command search.
Press S anytime to open shortcuts · Enter runs the first result
